CustomField.description: General escalation parameter, that the system will use by default for Supplemental Rents. If you want custom escalation for Supplemental Rent, set it on the page and this will be ignored
CustomField.inlineHelpText: General escalation parameter, that the system will use by default for Supplemental Rents. If you want custom escalation for Supplemental Rent, set it on the page and this will be ignored.
CustomField.label: [OLD MR] Supplemental Rent Escalation
